data.title: Southwest Strategies Group Rebrands as Bodewell Group Following Sustained Growth and Strategic Acquisitions
data.description: A newly launched brand consolidates several agencies to form a cohesive strategic communications firm concentrated on serving client requirements in the country's crucial infrastructure sectors. This move streamlines operations and enhances the firm's ability to deliver specialized services to clients in key infrastructure industries.

data.title: Employers Holdings, Inc. reveals Q4 2025 financials, declares $0.32/share dividend, and finishes $125M recapitalization.
data.description: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. This decrease in unemployment is attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the report mentioned that the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was recorded at 5.2%, exceeding initial expectations. These positive economic indicators have led experts to predict a strong economic recovery in the coming months.

data.title: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces Sale of the Four Seasons Resort Orlando at Walt Disney World® Resort and the Four Seasons Resort and Residences Jackson Hole
data.description: The sale of the St. Regis Houston has been successfully finalized, as previously announced.

data.title: Integrated Environmental Technology (IET) Announces Restructured Engineering Division and Appoints Carter Belvin as Vice President of Engineering
data.description: Integrated Environmental Technology (IET) has announced a restructured Engineering Division along with the appointment of Carter Belvin PE as the Vice President of Engineering. Belvin will bring a wealth of experience to the role as he takes charge of overseeing the division. This move comes as part of IET's efforts to enhance their engineering capabilities and drive innovation within the company. Belvin's expertise will be instrumental as IET focuses on expanding its engineering projects and maximizing efficiency. This restructuring is expected to lead to a more streamlined and effective engineering process, ultimately benefiting the company as a whole.

data.title: Smartkem Announces Significant Reduction in Accounts Payable Through Debt Conversion Agreement
data.description: In Manchester, UK, on Feb. 6, 2026, Smartkem, Inc. (Nasdaq: SMTK), a prominent player in advanced materials, revealed a recent development. The company disclosed its participation in a debt conversion deal wherein a portion of their outstanding accounts payable has been completely resolved. This was achieved by issuing equity securities of the company to the concerned parties.

data.title: NowVertical Unifies Global Brand, Exceeds Integration Target and Accelerates Enterprise Revenue Growth
data.description: The successful implementation of the One Brand strategy has resulted in enhanced operational efficiency, better execution of cross-selling initiatives, and solidification of the company's foundation for sustainable growth by 2026. This strategic move has led to significant improvements in key operational metrics, driving increased profitability and paving the way for expansion.

data.title: ReelTime Slashes Potential Dilution by Over 74% with Historic Capital Reset
data.description: Leading tech companies including NVIDIA (NVDA), Alphabet (GOOGL), Palantir (PLTR), Microsoft (MSFT), and Meta Platforms (META) are increasing their share counts to secure funds for capital-intensive AI projects. In contrast, ReelTime Media (RLTR) is taking a different approach by enhancing per-share value instead.

data.title: ReelTime Media Cuts Outstanding Debt in Half, Bringing Total Debt Reduction Over the Past Year Down More Than 64%
data.description: As companies like Nvidia, Oracle, AMD, Alphabet, and Microsoft increase their borrowing to finance costly AI infrastructure projects, ReelTime is focusing on lowering its debts and improving its financial position. The mentioned companies are investing heavily in AI infrastructure, with a combined leverage of over $X billion. In contrast, ReelTime is taking a different approach by prioritizing reducing its debt levels and transforming its balance sheet. This strategic move sets ReelTime apart from its counterparts, who are significantly leveraging to support their AI initiatives.

data.title: Maxim Power Corp. Announces 2025 Fourth Quarter Financial and Operating Results
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on March 19, 2026, Maxim Power Corp. (TSX: MXG) shared financial and operating details for Q4 ending on December 31, 2025. The audited consolidated financial statements, accompanying notes, and Management’s Discussion and Analysis (“MD&A”) will be accessible on SEDAR+ and MAXIM's site on the same day. All figures are in Canadian dollars.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- SecureIQLab/
data.description: A recent report by SecureIQLab has revealed a significant 62-point disparity in cloud firewall security among 12 different vendors. The findings were updated on 19-Mar-2026, indicating the gap in security measures across various providers. These alarming statistics highlight the discrepancies in safeguarding cloud infrastructure and emphasize the need for effective cybersecurity measures.

data.title: Daversa Promotes Nine to Managing Director, Strengthening Leadership Across Critical Growth Sectors
data.description: In San Francisco, Daversa has recently promoted nine leaders to the position of Managing Director. Those promoted are Connor Freeborn, Nicole Kaylor, Emma Mango, Danny Nilsen, Alana North, Angela Pezzello, Carly Rizzo, Brittany Rosenfeld, and Kendall Simmons. Collectively, they bring over seventy years of experience in constructing executive teams for venture-backed firms during crucial periods of expansion and accelerated growth. This move showcases the company's commitment to nurturing talent within its ranks.

data.title: BioCardia to Host 2025 Financial Results and Corporate Update Conference Call on March 24, 2026
data.description: Sunnyvale, CA - March 19, 2026 - BioCardia®, Inc. will be hosting a conference call on March 24, 2026, at 4:30 PM EDT to disclose their financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2025. The company, listed as [NASDAQ: BCDA], specializes in developing cellular and cell-derived treatments for cardiovascular and pulmonary conditions. The event will include a corporate update from management followed by a Q&A session.

data.title: Samsonite Group S.A. Announces Board Chair Transition
data.description: Timothy Charles Parker will step down as Board Chair after the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Jerome Squire Griffith will take over the position. This announcement was made in Mansfield, Mass. and Hong Kong on March 19, 2026. Samsonite Group S.A. and its subsidiaries, collectively known as "the Company," will see this transition in leadership.

data.title: Cavvy reports increased warrant exercises, signaling growing interest.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.5%, with more than 9 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the GDP for the last quarter decreased by 5.2%, marking a significant contraction in the economy. The government is taking steps to address these challenges and stimulate economic growth.

data.title: Renewal Fuels, Inc. (OTC: RNWF), Operating as American Fusion, Issues Statement Regarding False Online Report of Public Offering
data.description: Renewal Fuels, Inc. trading as American Fusion (OTC: RNWF) has released a statement concerning a misleading online claim of a public offering. The company emphasized that there is no truth to this report.
Terra Property Trust, Inc. Releases Additional Information Related to Exchange Offers and Hires Restructuring Advisors

data.title: Labrador Gold Announces Closing of Change of Business and Acquisition of Units of Northern Shield
data.description: Labrador Gold Corp. has officially received final approval from the TSX Venture Exchange for its Change of Business to become a hybrid Mining/investment issuer. The approval was granted after shareholders voted in favor of the change at the Annual General & Special Meeting held on February 24, 2026. The new Board of Directors, including Roger Moss, James Borland, Leo Karabelas, and Kevin Ramsay, decided to retain the company's name as Labrador Gold Corp. rather than changing it to Exin Ventures Inc. The trading halt on the company's common shares will be lifted, and it will begin trading as a hybrid Mining/investment issuer under the symbol “LAB” starting Wednesday, March 11, 2026.

data.title: Thor Equities Secures $16M Financing for 139 Fifth Avenue in NYC’s Flatiron District
data.description: In New York City on March 3, 2026, Thor Equities Group, known for urban real estate endeavors, confirmed securing $16 million in fresh funding from Northeast Bank for their property at 139 Fifth Avenue in the renowned Flatiron District.

data.title: Anaptys Provides Update on Business Separation and Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: San Diego based AnaptysBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANAB), a biotech firm focusing on advanced immunology treatments, shared details regarding the proposed spin-off of its biopharma division. The company also disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluded on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Loci Capital Completes Exit Through Strategic Recapitalization of Prose Stevens Pointe Multifamily Investment
data.description: Loci Capital has successfully finalized the recapitalization exit of Prose Stevens Pointe, a workforce apartment community located in St. Cloud, FL. The property consists of 264 units and is situated near Orlando.
